zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean Douglas於1552年11月25日出生在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾時，她的父親William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus20歲，母親Egidia Graham16歲。她於大約1566年與Sir James Wishart在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1610年3月3日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾巴爾馬哈享年57歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean Douglas于1552年11月25日出生在英国苏格兰洛-爾时，她的父亲William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus20岁，母亲Egidia Graham16岁。她于大约1566年与Sir James Wishart在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1610年3月3日在苏格兰斯林史爾巴爾馬哈享年57岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean Douglas was born on 25 November 1552, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus, was 20 and her mother, Egidia Graham, was 16. She married Sir James Wishart about 1566, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 March 1610, in Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean Douglas est née le 25 novembre 1552, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Egidia Graham, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Wishart environ 1566, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mars 1610, à Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean Douglas am 25. November 1552 in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus 20 und ihre Mutter Egidia Graham 16. Sie hat um 1566 in Schottland, United Kingdom Sir James Wishart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. März 1610 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Douglas è nata il il 25 novembre 1552 nel Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Egidia Graham, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Wishart circa 1566, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1610, nel Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean Douglasが1552年11月25日にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父William Douglas 9th Earl of Angusは20歳，母Egidia Grahamは16歳であった。約1566年にイギリススコットランドでSir James Wishartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1610年3月3日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアボーマーハで57歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean Douglas(이)가 1552년 11월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Egidia Graham(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1566년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Sir James Wishart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1610년 3월 3일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 바마하에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

pt.25 November 1552–3 March 1610: 25 de novembro de 1552–3 de março de 1610
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean Douglas nasceu em 25 de novembro de 1552, em Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Egidia Graham, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Wishart aproximadamente 1566, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de março de 1610, em Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean Douglas родилась 25 ноября 1552 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Egidia Graham, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Wishart около 1566 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 марта 1610 г. в местности балмаха, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.25 November 1552–3 March 1610: 25 de noviembre de 1552–3 de marzo de 1610
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean Douglas nació el 25 de noviembre de 1552, en Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Douglas 9th Earl of Angus, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Egidia Graham, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir James Wishart aproximadamente 1566, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1610, en Balmaha, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
